component.name: FioBank Statement Tools
component.summary: Download, email and report FioBank account statements

description.p: A suite of CLI tools for working with FioBank statements and transactions. Provides automated downloading in multiple formats, email delivery, and JSON transaction reporting with built-in API rate limiting.

Includes three tools: fiobank-statement-downloader for saving statements to disk, fiobank-statement-mailer for emailing statements, and fiobank-transaction-report for generating JSON transaction summaries.
